purpose: Fresh public-route check for Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.14848598 after the smartwatch subitem route refresh.

route.name: Comprehensive Multi-Modal Dataset for Parkinson's Disease Prediction

inspection.primary_columns: visit_id plus CSF protein/peptide features; no raw wearable IMU columns

source_lineage: AMP Parkinson's Disease Progression Prediction Data (Kaggle)
route.label: UPDRS part totals and scalar gait summaries in a derived table; no item-level Part III raw subitems
route.modality: CSF protein/peptide features plus scalar gait summaries (gait_time, gait_steps, freezing), not raw wearable IMU
route.verdict: Public derived benchmark table, not a contemporaneous wearable sensor cohort. It mixes Kaggle AMP clinical/CSF data with a Mendeley gait repository, exposes only scalar gait summaries rather than raw IMU, and lacks T1 item-level labels or a trustworthy subject-aligned wearable-to-UPDRS schema. No preregistration, download, scaffold, or remote job is justified.
